message:
fix(codegen+runtime): Add UnifiedInt bitwise ops, lambda param discards, intBuiltinCall

Three foundation fixes for CPython test compatibility:

1. UnifiedInt bitwise operations (BitAnd, BitOr, BitXor)
   - Added bitwise ops to UnifiedInt in pyint.zig with proper small/big handling
   - Added wrapper functions in unified_int_ops.zig
   - Updated codegen map to dispatch bitwise ops to runtime helpers
   - Fixes: n = hibit | getrandbits(bits - 1) patterns in test_int

2. Lambda parameter discards
   - Lambda params marked as "used" may not actually appear in generated body
   - Now emits `_ = ¶m;` for all named params to prevent Zig errors
   - Applies to both module-level lambdas and inline struct lambdas
   - Fixes: unused function parameter errors in test_print

3. Export runtime.intBuiltinCall
   - Added int_ops module export to runtime.zig
   - Direct export of intBuiltinCall for assertRaises(ValueError, int, ...)
   - Fixes: 'runtime' has no member named 'intBuiltinCall' in test_int
